data.body: Plan-review of epic sure-foyer-aroma + 14 children COMPLETE: all 15 PASS, 0 BLOCK on the original pass. Applied user-approved Tier 1+2+3 advisory remediation (13 file_impacts, 8 description rewrites incl. eval-harness prereq, OVERLAY_IDS registration, trailer plumbing, detector granularity, softened pink-elephant overclaim, defined baseline). Per user, re-reviewed ONLY story A (eval-foundation) now; deferred the other 13 attestation refreshes to claim-time. A's re-review surfaced a LEGITIMATE BLOCK (G6): the eval output-shape contract was unspecified — eval_scorers._fired() matches only verdict=='FAIL' but the code-review gate emits BLOCK/PASS, so seeded-defect recall cases could vacuously pass. Remediated A's plan to pin the contract (arm runs individual prompts, scores on findings presence/absence, never routes code-review cases through the FAIL-only _fired). Subsequent re-reviews of A (attempts 3,4,5) degraded reproducibly: verdict INDETERMINATE, verify_requests=0, llm_ms~=21ms despite 26 llm_calls, 0x429, EMPTY stderr — Pass-2 verify silently non-dispatches; clearing .rebar/cache (no A entry) didn't help; attempt 1 on the prior plan verified normally (verify_requests=43). Filed as gate-reliability bug turf-purple-dot (4a4c-6fb2-67c8-41d4), discovered_from ac1b. NET: A's plan is remediated + sound; a clean signed attestation is blocked by that anomaly, so A refreshes at claim-time like the other 13. Evidence JSONs in ~/.claude/jobs/19885ca3/tmp/planrev/.
